---
name: Content Submission 📚
about: Use this if you are planning to write a new lesson, add notes, or submit a project
title: '[SUBMISSION] '
labels: documentation, good first issue
assignees: ''
---

**What type of content are you submitting?**
(e.g., Class 12 Physics Notes, ReactJS Tutorial, Python sorting algorithm)

**Which pillar does this belong to?**
Provide the folder path where this content should live.

**Outline of the content**
Provide a brief summary or outline of what the lesson/notes will cover.

**Has this been discussed in a previous issue?**
If yes, please link the issue number here.

**Checklist before submitting the Pull Request:**
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines.
- [ ] My content is formatted cleanly in Markdown (`.md`).
- [ ] Any code I submit is commented and explained.
